step_rationale: Glycocalyx shedding marker; endothelial damage in ACS.
mechanism: Syndecan-1 shedding from damaged endothelium marks endothelial activation and erosion-driven Type 1 MI pathogenesis.

references.title: Novel biomarkers in the prognosis of patients with atherosclerotic coronary artery disease.
Evaluation of the endothelial glycocalyx damage in patients with acute coronary syndrome.
Association between sympathoadrenal activation, fibrinolysis, and endothelial damage in septic patients: a prospective study.
Acute myocardial infarction is associated with endothelial glycocalyx and cell damage and a parallel increase in circulating catecholamines.
